artifacts.summary: Implementation plan with 4 phases (3.5h total) to fix pgrep self-match bug, add opencode detection, re-enable the sleep inhibitor service, and document toggle interface

memory_candidates.content: When writing systemd user services in Nix that detect running processes, always use pgrep with -x (exact match) and -u $UID (current user only) to avoid self-matching the inhibitor script, memory trackers, or earlyoom regex patterns. This pattern is reusable for any process-guarding systemd service in Nix Home Manager configurations.
